title: KArtz
body:
KArtz is a full-stack MERN web application designed for buying and selling posters online. It features a modern UI with separate admin and customer dashboards. Admins can upload posters, manage inventory, and track orders, while users can browse, add items to cart or wishlist, and securely purchase products.

The platform includes authentication, order history, and real-time interaction between admin and customers for quick query resolution. The project demonstrates strong skills in full-stack development, API integration, and user experience design.

Future enhancements include AI-based recommendations, poster customization, chatbot support, and multilingual support.

title: Network Monitoring Dashboard
body:
This project is a real-time network monitoring dashboard that tracks system and network performance metrics such as CPU usage, memory usage, uptime, latency, jitter, and packet loss.

Built using Python with tools like Scapy and Nmap, the system captures and analyzes network packets. It also features a web-based dashboard displaying graphs for IP traffic, CPU usage, and Wi-Fi activity.

Additional features include CSV export for network data, detection of nearby devices, and a responsive UI with dark mode support. This project highlights strong knowledge of networking concepts and real-time data visualization.

title: Remote Access Tool
body:
This project enables a mobile device to function as a remote controller for a laptop using Wi-Fi connectivity. It allows users to control mouse, keyboard, PowerPoint presentations, and media playback remotely.

Developed using Java, the application connects devices using IP-based communication. It provides a smooth and responsive control experience, making it useful for presentations and remote system interaction.

This project demonstrates practical implementation of networking, client-server communication, and real-world usability.

title: Resume Matching System
body:
The Resume Matching System is a web-based application that analyzes resumes and matches them with job descriptions using natural language processing techniques.

It helps recruiters filter candidates efficiently by ranking resumes based on relevance and skills. The system processes text data, extracts key features, and computes similarity scores.

This project showcases skills in NLP, machine learning, and building intelligent web applications for real-world hiring problems.

title: Little Learning School Website
body:
The Little Learning School Website is a responsive and user-friendly web application designed to provide essential information about the school to students, parents, and staff.

The platform includes sections such as homepage, about us, courses, admissions, contact details, and announcements. It focuses on delivering a clean UI and smooth navigation to enhance user experience.

The website ensures accessibility across devices with a fully responsive design and structured layout. It serves as a digital presence for the school, helping streamline communication and improve visibility.

Key Learnings:
➤ Designed responsive layouts using modern CSS techniques
➤ Improved UI/UX for better user engagement
➤ Structured multi-page website with proper navigation
➤ Gained experience in frontend development and deployment
➤ Learned to build real-world informational websites
